Revvity_384_6007660.label: Revvity_384_6007660
Revvity_384_6007660.notes: Black polystyrene, 384 square flat-bottom wells, TC-treated. Dimensions verified against Revvity TDS drawing 0PD 384AP-24431 (2023). Run without lid; lid would exceed Echo 16mm height limit.

Greiner_384_781096.label: Greiner_384_781096
Greiner_384_781096.notes: Greiner 384-well polystyrene flat-bottom. Echo Cherry Pick ships a factory plate definition for this part (the original name was Greiner_384PS_781096); to use the iPLAID-standardised name above, copy the factory entry in Plate Type Editor and rename it to Greiner_384_781096.

Corning_384_3784.label: Corning_384_3784
Corning_384_3784.notes: Standard Corning 384-well polystyrene flat-bottom dimensions. Verify against your specific Corning 3784 datasheet before adding to Echo Plate Type Editor; this SKU is not in Corning's current public e-catalog and may be a regional/legacy variant.

ibidi_384_88406.label: ibidi_384_88406
ibidi_384_88406.notes: Microscopy-grade #1.5 polymer coverslip bottom, ibiTreat surface, black walls. ANSI/SLAS 1-2004 compliant. Dimensions verified against ibidi instruction manual v1.0 (2023-03-02). Run WITHOUT lid; height with lid is 17.2mm which exceeds Echo's 16mm destination-plate limit. Recommended volume 50 µL (range 20-100 µL).
